faqs.a: Yes — all our surveyors are RICS registered professionals.

faqs.q: What is a Rights of Light Assessment?
faqs.a: It's an evaluation to determine if new developments will affect existing rights of light.
We offer expert consultation but recommend consulting with a solicitor for legal advice.

faqs.q: How long does the assessment take?
faqs.a: Typically 2-4 weeks, depending on project complexity and scope.
